200# return «
choose a throne:

Event: The Dark Adventure
Event Date: 25/04/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E37
Engraving 'Will to Live'

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while the engraving owner casts restoration on themselves and 2 nearby allies. It removes a random negative effect from them, and they recover 52900 / 75600 / 108000 / 144000 / 180000 / 225000 / 275000 health. It also increases their damage by 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% and health by 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 20% / 22% / 25% for 4 sec.

Enhancement: 2
11000 Magic armor from the gems
Once in a while the engraving owner casts restoration on themselves and 3 nearby allies. It removes a random negative effect from them, and they recover 58800 / 84000 / 120000 / 160000 / 200000 / 250000 / 300000 health. It also increases their damage by 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% and health by 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% for 4 sec. The targets also gain a shield that blocks 45% / 46% / 47% / 48% / 50% / 52% / 55% magic damage for 4 sec.

Enhancement: 3
22000 Magic armor from the gems
Once in a while the unit casts a harmony effect on themselves and 3 nearby allies for 4 sec. During this time, the unit with the harmony effect recovers 27000 / 38600 / 55200 / 73600 / 92000 / 115000 /
150000 health every second, and all allies in a small radius around the unit recover 40% / 41% / 42% / 43% / 45% / 47% / 50% of health recovered by the main targets. When the harmony effect wears off, the main targets of the ability and all allies in a small radius around them have their max health, physical and magic armor, and fortitude increased by 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% for 4 sec. The targets also gain a shield that blocks 50% / 51% / 52% / 53% / 55% / 57% / 60% magic damage for 4 sec.

Requirements:

Cooldown: 9 secs
